creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text: Many (all?) openal ports fail to link with lld, tracked in PR 226980. This all appears to be due to a reliance on the way ld.bfd handles preemption of protected visibility symbols in shared libraries. This may be fixed with a change to the openal lib, by making all of these dependent ports avoid lld (LLD_UNSAFE), or by adding a flag to lld to adopt the (broken?) bfd behaviour.
